lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਨਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਾਇ ਕੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਚੇਤੈ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu janam padaarath paae kai har naam na chetai liv laae |
lines.english: The blessing of this human life has been obtained, but still, people do not lovingly focus their thoughts on the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਗਿ ਖਿਸਿਐ ਰਹਣਾ ਨਹੀ ਆਗੈ ਠਉਰੁ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: pag khisiai rahanaa nahee aagai tthaur na paae |
lines.english: Their feet slip, and they cannot stay here any longer. And in the next world, they find no place of rest at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹ ਵੇਲਾ ਹਥਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਅੰਤਿ ਗਇਆ ਪਛੁਤਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: oeh velaa hath na aavee ant geaa pachhutaae |
lines.english: This opportunity shall not come again. In the end, they depart, regretting and repenting.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖਾ ਦੇਖੀ ਸਭ ਕਰੇ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਬੂਝ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dekhaa dekhee sabh kare manamukh boojh na paae |
lines.english: They all show off and pretend, but the self-willed manmukhs do not understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਸੋ ਉਬਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਤੀ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jis nadar kare so ubarai har setee liv laae |4|
lines.english: Those whom the Lord blesses with His Glance of Grace are saved; they are lovingly attuned to the Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਿਰਦਾ ਸੁਧੁ ਹੈ ਸੇਵ ਪਈ ਤਿਨ ਥਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jin guramukh hiradaa sudh hai sev pee tin thaae |
lines.english: Those Gurmukhs who are pure of heart-their service is accepted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਤ ਪੜਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har gun gaaveh har nit parreh har gun gaae samaae |
lines.english: They sing the Glorious Praise of the Lord; they read about the Lord each day. Singing the Praise of the Lord, they merge in absorption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਹੈ ਜਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਹੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੫॥੪॥੩੭॥
lines.translit: naanak tin kee baanee sadaa sach hai ji naam rahe liv laae |5|4|37|
lines.english: O Nanak, the words of those who are lovingly attuned to the Naam are true forever. ||5||4||37||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੇ ਮੁਖ ਸਦ ਉਜਲੇ ਤਿਤੁ ਸਚੈ ਦਰਬਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: tin ke mukh sad ujale tith sachai darabaar |
lines.english: -their faces are forever radiant in the Court of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinee ik man naam dhiaaeaa guramatee veechaar |
lines.english: Those who meditate single-mindedly on the Naam, and contemplate the Teachings of the Guru

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਮਲੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਕਢੈ ਧੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har sadaa dhiaaeeai mal haumai kadtai dhoe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: They meditate forever on the Lord, Har, Har, and they wash off the filth of egotism. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਦਾ ਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re guramukh sadaa pat hoe |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, the Gurmukhs are honored forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਵਹਿ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: oe amrit peeveh sadaa sadaa sachai naam piaar |1|
lines.english: They drink in the Ambrosial Nectar forever and ever, and they love the True Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਪਤਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh naam na jaananee vin naavai pat jaae |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs do not know the Naam. Without the Name, they lose their honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਸਟਾ ਕੇ ਕੀੜੇ ਪਵਹਿ ਵਿਚਿ ਵਿਸਟਾ ਸੇ ਵਿਸਟਾ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: visattaa ke keerre paveh vich visattaa se visattaa maeh samaae |2|
lines.english: They are worms in the filth of manure. They fall into manure, and into manure they are absorbed. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੈ ਸਾਦੁ ਨ ਆਇਓ ਲਾਗੇ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabadai saad na aaeo laage doojai bhaae |
lines.english: They do not savor the Taste of the Shabad; they are attached to the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਲੁ ਉਧਾਰਹਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਧੰਨੁ ਜਣੇਦੀ ਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kul udhaareh aapanaa dhan janedee maae |
lines.english: Their families are saved; blessed are the mothers who gave birth to them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਫਲੁ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਚਲਹਿ ਸਤਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tin kaa janam safal hai jo chaleh satagur bhaae |
lines.english: Fruitful are the lives of those who walk in harmony with the Will of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jinee guramukh naam dhiaaeaa vichahu aap gavaae |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs meditate on the Naam; they eradicate selfishness and conceit from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਜਿਸ ਨਉ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਰਜਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har har naam dhiaaeeai jis nau kirapaa kare rajaae |3|
lines.english: By His Will He grants His Grace; those who are so blessed, meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਅੰਦਰਹੁ ਬਾਹਰਹੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੇ ਸਚੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: oe andarahu baaharahu niramale sache sach samaae |
lines.english: They are pure, inwardly and outwardly; they merge into the Truest of the True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਏ ਸੇ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਹਹਿ ਜਿਨ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੪॥੫॥੩੮॥
lines.translit: naanak aae se paravaan heh jin guramatee har dhiaae |4|5|38|
lines.english: O Nanak, blessed is the coming of those who follow the Guru's Teachings and meditate on the Lord. ||4||5||38||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਰਾਸਿ ਹੈ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਛਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਵਾਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har bhagataa har dhan raas hai gur poochh kareh vaapaar |
lines.english: The devotees of the Lord have the Wealth and Capital of the Lord; with Guru's Advice, they carry on their trade.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਨਿ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਵਖਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har naam salaahan sadaa sadaa vakhar har naam adhaar |
lines.english: They praise the Name of the Lord forever and ever. The Name of the Lord is their Merchandise and Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਾ ਅਤੁਟੁ ਭੰਡਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur poorai har naam drirraaeaa har bhagataa atutt bhanddaar |1|
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has implanted the Name of the Lord into the Lord's devotees; it is an Inexhaustible Treasure. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏ ਮਨ ਆਲਸੁ ਕਿਆ ਕਰਹਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: e man aalas kiaa kareh guramukh naam dhiaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O mind, why are you so lazy? Become Gurmukh, and meditate on the Naam. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਇਸੁ ਮਨ ਕਉ ਸਮਝਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re is man kau samajhaae |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, instruct your minds in this way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਪਿਆਰੁ ਹੈ ਜੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਰੇ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har bhagat har kaa piaar hai je guramukh kare beechaar |
lines.english: Devotion to the Lord is love for the Lord. The Gurmukh reflects deeply and contemplates.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਖੰਡਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਬੋਲੁ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: paakhandd bhagat na hovee dubidhaa bol khuaar |
lines.english: Hypocrisy is not devotion-speaking words of duality leads only to misery.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਰਲਾਇਆ ਨਾ ਰਲੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਿਬੇਕ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: so jan ralaaeaa naa ralai jis antar bibek beechaar |2|
lines.english: Those humble beings who are filled with keen understanding and meditative contemplation-even though they intermingle with others, they remain distinct. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਹਰਿ ਆਖੀਐ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖੈ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: so sevak har aakheeai jo har raakhai ur dhaar |
lines.english: Those who keep the Lord enshrined within their hearts are said to be the servants of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸਉਪੇ ਆਗੈ ਧਰੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਮਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: man tan saupe aagai dhare haumai vichahu maar |
lines.english: Placing mind and body in offering before the Lord, they conquer and eradicate egotism from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੋ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਹੈ ਜਿ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਹਾਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dhan guramukh so paravaan hai ji kade na aavai haar |3|
lines.english: Blessed and acclaimed is that Gurmukh, who shall never be defeated. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਾ ਪਾਈਐ ਵਿਣੁ ਕਰਮੈ ਪਾਇਆ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: karam milai taa paaeeai vin karamai paaeaa na jaae |
lines.english: Those who receive His Grace find Him. Without His Grace, He cannot be found.
